lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Greetings, [player name]. Can I help you with anything, today?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How can I train my prayer?

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: I think you should be teaching me a thing or two, shouldn't you?

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Well, if you really want my advice...

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: The most common way to train prayer is by either burying bones, or offering them to the gods at some kind of an altar.

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Lots of adventurers build such altars in their own homes, or there are a few frequent places of worship around the world.

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Different kinds of bones will help you to train faster. Generally speaking, the bigger they are and the more frightening a creature they come from, the better they are for it.

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: The gods look kindly upon their devout followers. There are all kinds of benefits they may provide, if you pray for them!

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: They could help you in combat, help your wounds to heal more quickly, protect your belongings... There's a lot they can do for you!

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: You can find out more by looking in your prayer book.

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: You need to be careful that your prayers don't run out, though. You can get prayer potions to help you recharge, or you can pray at an altar whenever one's nearby.

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Is there anything else you would like to know?

lines.speaker: Prayer tutor
lines.text: Very well. Saradomin be with you!
